title: The Naval and Aircraft Prize Act, 1971
full_text: The Naval and Aircraft Prize Act, 1971 नौसैनिक और वायुयान प्राइजअधिनियम, 1971 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 1971-59 Act Number: 59 Enactment Date: 1971-12-16 Act Year: 1971 Short Title: The Naval and Aircraft Prize Act, 1971 Hindi Title: नौसैनिक और वायुयान प्राइजअधिनियम, 1971 Long Title: An Act to provide for the establishment and procedure of Prize Courts and for matters connected therewith or incidental thereto. Ministry: Ministry of Defence Department: Department of Military Affairs Enforcement Date: 16-12-1971 Last Updated: 15-04-2019 TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The Naval and Aircraft Prize Act, 1971 Show all section Section 1. Short title. Section 2. Definitions. Section 3. Establishment of Prize Courts. Section 4. Jurisdiction of Prize Courts in prize cases. Section 5. Transfer of cases. Section 6. Appeals. Section 7. General powers of Prize Courts. Section 8. Procedure on capture of prize. Section 9. Ship and aircraft papers to be brought in Registry. Section 10. Goods. Section 11. Preemption. Section 12. Prize proceedings not to apply to enemy warships and military aircraft. Section 13. Capture to belong to Central Government. Section 14. Prize salvage. Section 15. Offences in respect of prize. Section 16. Indemnity against legal proceedings. Section 17. Power to make rules. Section 18. Dissolution of Prize Courts. Section 19. Repeals. Section 20. Savings.
